Elephant Charge 2013

26 October 2013 · 📍 Seven Rivers

17 Entries
4 Completed
24% Finish rate
$225,921 Raised
10 Checkpoints
3× Gauntlet mult.

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×3 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

Pilatus — For selflessly coming to the aid of another competitor who was hopelessly stuck and in the process giving up their own hopes of victory.

Elephant Charge results archive — data updated annually after each event.
